category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Botswana market (BOBS conformity, BOS standards adopting EN 149 FFP, occupational-safety framework, importer/inspection).

title.en: China-to-Botswana PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入博茨瓦纳（BOBS）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入波札那（BOBS）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Botswana market-access requirements: BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) conformity and import inspection under the BOS mark scheme, Botswana national standards adopting EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the occupational-safety framework for workplace respiratory protection, and the role of the importer of record. Botswana is landlocked; PPE typically arrives via Durban or Walvis Bay.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与博茨瓦纳市场准入要求对照：博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）在BOS标志制度下的合格评定及进口检验、采用EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的博茨瓦纳国家标准、工作场所呼吸防护的职业安全框架，以及进口商的责任。博茨瓦纳为内陆国，PPE通常经德班或鲸湾港转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與波札那市場准入要求對照：波札那標準局（BOBS）在BOS標誌制度下的合格評定及進口檢驗、採用EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的波札那國家標準、工作場所呼吸防護的職業安全框架，以及進口商的責任。波札那為內陸國，PPE通常經德班或鯨灣港轉運。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Botswana law, BOBS conformity and import-inspection procedures, adopted standards, and occupational-safety requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Botswana's adoption of international/regional standards and the precise scope of mandatory conformity for respiratory PPE require case-by-case verification with BOBS.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行博茨瓦纳法律、BOBS合格评定与进口检验程序、所采用的标准及职业安全要求。博茨瓦纳对国际/区域标准的采用情况，以及呼吸类PPE强制合格评定的确切范围，须逐案向BOBS核实。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行波札那法律、BOBS合格評定與進口檢驗程序、所採用的標準及職業安全要求。波札那對國際/區域標準的採用情況，以及呼吸類PPE強制合格評定的確切範圍，須逐案向BOBS核實。

answer_first.en: Filtering facepiece respirators entering Botswana are regulated primarily through the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS), which operates conformity assessment and import-inspection under the BOS mark/standards-mark scheme and adopts international/regional standards (commonly EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3 and SANS/IEC-aligned standards). Workplace respiratory protection also sits within Botswana's occupational-safety framework. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) and GB 19083 test reports are not automatically recognised; the importer of record typically arranges BOBS conformity/inspection against the adopted EN 149 requirements. Botswana is landlocked, so goods route via Durban (South Africa) or Walvis Bay (Namibia).
answer_first.zh: 进入博茨瓦纳的过滤式半面罩呼吸器主要由博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）监管。BOBS在BOS标志/标准标志制度下实施合格评定及进口检验，并采用国际/区域标准（常见为EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3及与SANS/IEC一致的标准）。工作场所呼吸防护同时纳入博茨瓦纳职业安全框架。中国KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083检测报告不会自动获得认可；通常由进口商按所采用的EN 149要求安排BOBS合格评定/检验。博茨瓦纳为内陆国，货物经德班（南非）或鲸湾港（纳米比亚）转运。
answer_first.zht: 進入波札那的過濾式半面罩呼吸器主要由波札那標準局（BOBS）監管。BOBS在BOS標誌/標準標誌制度下實施合格評定及進口檢驗，並採用國際/區域標準（常見為EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3及與SANS/IEC一致的標準）。工作場所呼吸防護同時納入波札那職業安全框架。中國KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083檢測報告不會自動獲得認可；通常由進口商按所採用的EN 149要求安排BOBS合格評定/檢驗。波札那為內陸國，貨物經德班（南非）或鯨灣港（納米比亞）轉運。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to BOBS conformity/import-inspection procedures or adopted respiratory-PPE standards
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official BOBS, Botswana government, regional (SADC/ARSO), or primary standards-body sources are preferred over secondary commentary.
